code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import{useInView}from'../../hooks/useInView';import'./FAQ.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const FAQ=()=>{const[openIndex,setOpenIndex]=useState(null);const[faqRef,faqVisible]=useInView();const faqs=[{question:"What does working with Greyline Accountants Ltd. actually look like?",answer:"We embed into your agency as your structured finance function.
